title: Pre-sales Professional for bank professional services
description:
Role Summary

We are looking for a Pre-sales Professional to support business growth within Singapore local banks, focusing on Bank IT related professional services, System Integration (SI), and enterprise-scale software delivery engagements.

This role is ideal for candidates with a software engineering background, solid understanding of Agile and enterprise delivery models, and 5-8 years (or more) of pre-sales or client-facing solution architecture experience. You will work closely with your mentor, solution architects, delivery leaders, and engineering teams to shape proposals for large, complex, multi-team software initiatives and convert opportunities into signed projects.

You will gain hands-on exposure to enterprise banking platforms, large delivery teams, multi-vendor environments, and long-running transformation programs.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support account coverage and opportunity development for local banking clients, engaging IT, engineering, architecture, and PMO stakeholders.
  • Participate in customer discovery to understand bank’s business goals, legacy systems, integration complexity, regulatory constraints, and delivery governance, to facilitate better customer support.
  • Take the responsibility in creating solution proposals for enterprise-scale professional services and SI projects, including:
  • Delivery approach (Agile, hybrid, scaled Agile)
  • Scope and assumptions
  • High-level architecture and integration considerations
  • Effort estimates, timelines, and staffing models (multi-squad / multi-vendor)
  • Coordinate with engineering leads, project managers, architects, and delivery managers to validate solution feasibility, dependencies, risks, and delivery plans.
  • Support proposal development for large software delivery programs, including phased rollouts, MVPs, and long-term roadmap-based engagements.
  • Prepare and deliver presentations, capability decks, and proposal walkthroughs for enterprise banking stakeholders.
  • Support RFI/RFP responses for large-scale engagements, including compliance matrices, delivery methodology descriptions, and bid coordination.
  • Support handover from sales to delivery, ensuring clarity on scope, assumptions, and success criteria for complex delivery programs.
  • Assist with ongoing account development, including change requests, delivery extensions, and new workstreams within existing enterprise programs.

Must-Have Requirements

  • Singapore Citizen / PR.
  • Software engineering background (education and/or hands-on experience) with the ability to understand (must have):
  • Enterprise system architectures
  • Integration patterns
  • SDLC for large-scale systems
  • Bank Application experience (Nice to have):
  • Mobile banking
  • Loan & credit
  • Core banking
  • Wealth management
  • Other banking common business system
  • Agile delivery experience (Good to have):
  • Agile delivery methodology
  • Sprint planning, backlog grooming, ceremonies
  • Delivery tracking across teams
  • 5-8 years (or above) of pre-sales or client-facing experience in IT services, software, system integration, or technology consulting.
  • Comfortable engaging banking stakeholders (IT, engineering leads, architects, PMO, procurement).
  • Strong communication skills in English and Chinese (Mandarin) for client discussions and documentation.

Preferred / Advantage

  • Exposure to enterprise or large-scale software delivery (multi-team, multi-vendor, long-running programs).
  • Experience supporting banking technology environments:
  • Digital channels
  • Middleware / integration
  • Data platforms
  • Security, risk, and compliance systems
  • Experience estimating and scoping enterprise software delivery work, including:
  • Requirements decomposition
  • Integration and testing effort
  • Release and rollout planning

Key Competencies

  • Structured thinking and clear documentation
  • Strong ownership and follow-through
  • Ability to bridge business needs with enterprise technical delivery approaches
  • Comfortable working across sales, pre-sales, and large delivery teams
  • Willingness to learn enterprise banking domains and delivery complexity

What You’ll Get

  • Clear progression path into Solution Sales, Enterprise Pre-Sales or Account Management.
  • Mentorship from senior sales, architects, and delivery leaders
  • Exposure to enterprise-scale banking transformation and large software delivery programs
  • Opportunity to grow from supporting deals to owning complex client engagements

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
